name: Eggs Baked in Peppers- Washington Time
recipeInstructions:
1. Select well-shaped peppers that will sit upright. Halve them crosswise and remove seeds. Trim stems but do not make a hole.
2. Parboil the peppers in simmering, salted water until just tender, then drain the peppers.
3. Break 2 eggs into each pepper half. Season with salt and pepper, and top with a 1/2 tablespoon slice of butter. Place the peppers in a small baking pan, pour in 1 inch of hot poaching water, and bake briefly at 375 degrees until eggs set.
4. Drizzle with tomato sauce. My suggestion is to try adding a spice such as Szechuan Style Pepper or Herb Pepper Blend instead of salt and pepper. (Szechuan is copied from the label of a McCormick spice jar.) This can also be cooked in a microwave oven on a low to medium setting.
